{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Underlady of the southern jungles
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Underlady of the southern jungles]] can sense an [[Underlord]] who unveils themselves.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
